channel.title: Major Digest - Reliable and Comprehensive News Sources: sports
channel.description: Get the latest news online at Major Digest, the top online news resource for the most reliable news sources. Stay informed about the world around you!

image.title: Major Digest - Reliable and Comprehensive News Sources: sports

item.title: Ex-NFL star Clinton Portis joins DeSean Jackson's staff at Delaware State as running backs coach
item.description: DOVER, Del. (AP) — Clinton Portis, who rushed for just under 10,000 yards over nine NFL seasons and was a two-time Pro Bowl selection, has been named DeSean Jackson's running backs coach and run game coordinator at Delaware State. The Hornets announced Portis' hiring on social media Thursday.
item.dc:creator: Associated Press, KGET 17, NBC

item.title: With Wembanyama's season now over, the Spurs and the basketball world wait for what's next
item.description: The French sports newspaper L’Equipe published a photo of Victor Wembanyama across the entirety of its front page on Friday, the San Antonio star looking down with his hands on his hips. “Coup D’Arret” was the headline in big, white letters. The translation, in this case, means Knockout Blow.
item.dc:creator: TIM REYNOLDS, Associated Press, PHL 17

item.title: College basketball: Murauskas provides X-factor to Saint Mary’s pursuit of second straight WCC regular season title
item.description: Saint Mary's will repeat as WCC outright regular-season champs for the first time in school history with a win on Saturday night at Gonzaga
item.dc:creator: Jeff Faraudo, The Mercury News

item.title: New York Yankees drop ban on beards, 49 years after it was imposed
item.description: TAMPA. Fla. (AP) — The New York Yankees dropped their ban on beards Friday, 49 years after it was imposed by owner George Steinbrenner. Current owner Hal Steinbrenner, son of The Boss, announced the change Friday before the team's spring training opener.
item.dc:creator: Associated Press, PIX 11

item.title: New York Yankees drop ban on beards, 49 years after it was imposed by owner George Steinbrenner
item.description: The New York Yankees have dropped their ban on beards, 49 years after it was imposed by owner George Steinbrenner.
item.dc:creator: Associated Press, KPRC 2

item.title: Hockey fans criticize Wayne Gretzky as he represents Team Canada at 4 Nations final vs US
item.description: Wayne Gretzky as the honorary captain for Team Canada was widely panned on Thursday night ahead of their 4 Nations Face-Off final vs. the U.S.
item.dc:creator: Fox News

item.title: Chiefs' Patrick Mahomes on a 'revenge tour' after losing Super Bowl LIX, teammate says
item.description: Kansas City Chiefs defensive end Charles Omenihu says Patrick Mahomes will be "on a mission," or perhaps a "revenge tour," after losing Super Bowl LIX.
item.dc:creator: Fox News

item.title: Justin Trudeau sends fiery message to US after Canada's 4 Nations win
item.description: Canadian Prime Minister Justin Trudeau had a fiery message for the U.S. on Thursday night after the 4 Nations Face-Off ended in an epic thriller.
item.dc:creator: Fox News

item.title: Trump gives Team USA pep talk before 4 Nations final vs Canada
item.description: President Donald Trump revealed his phone call with the U.S. Hockey Team, which was a motivational message delivered the way only Trump can.
item.dc:creator: Fox News

item.title: Milwaukee's Bobby Portis suspended after he mistakenly took painkiller Tramadol rather than Toradol
item.description: The NBA suspended Milwaukee forward Bobby Portis Jr. for 25 games without pay on Thursday because he tested positive for the painkiller Tramadol, a violation of the league's anti-drug program.
item.dc:creator: TIM REYNOLDS, Associated Press, KGET 17, NBC

item.title: Former NFL player Chris Kluwe arrested while protesting MAGA sign
item.description: Former NFL punter Chris Kluwe, an 8-year NFL veteran who played his entire career with the Minnesota Vikings, took to the podium to voice his opposition to the plaque design.
item.dc:creator: Travis Schlepp, NewsNation

item.title: Ja Morant has no comment on report that says group targeting pro athletes burglarized his home
item.description: INDIANAPOLIS (AP) — Two-time NBA All-Star Ja Morant is not talking about a published report that says he is the Memphis player whose home was burglarized by the seven men from Chile charged in federal court with orchestrating break-ins at the homes of prominent athletes around the country.
item.dc:creator: MICHAEL MAROT, Associated Press, KGET 17, NBC

item.title: Stephen Curry captures MVP honors in All-Star Game at home, leads Shaq’s OGs to victory
item.description: SAN FRANCISCO (AP) — The final pregame introduction belonged to none other than Stephen Curry. The big MVP trophy at the end, Curry heaved that high in the air, too, in a fitting finish to his special All-Star Game at home. His arena. His fans.
item.dc:creator: JANIE McCAULEY, Associated Press, KRON4

item.title: Padres baseball season in San Diego kicks off March 27 with opening series, East Village Block Party
item.description: The Padres are gearing up for the start of baseball season in San Diego and fans can get excited with the free East Village Block Party that takes place during opening weekend.
item.dc:creator: Anna Ashcraft, Fox 5

item.title: Aggies lose heartbreaker at first place New Mexico
item.description: ALBUQUERQUE (ABC4 Sports) - With first place in the Mountain West men’s basketball standings on the line, Utah State (22-4, 12-3 MW) fell just short on Sunday in Albuquerque, dropping an 82-79 thriller at The Pit. This marked the second time in two weeks the Aggies have lost to the Lobos.
item.dc:creator: Dana Greene, ABC 4

item.title: BYU rolls past Kansas State, 80-65
item.description: PROVO, Utah (AP) - Richie Saunders scored 17 points and grabbed 14 rebounds on Saturday night to help BYU beat Kansas State 80-65 and snap the Wildcats' six-game win streak. Dallin Hall scored 16 points and Fousseyni Traore 11 for BYU (17-8, 8-6 Big 12).
item.dc:creator: Dana Greene, ABC 4

item.title: The new NBA All-Star format is here, and Sunday night will show whether it works
item.description: This will be an actual All-Star matchup. On one side, there's a team with 86 combined All-Star selections, $2.7 billion in on-court earnings and where every single player on the team is either an NBA champion, an Olympic gold medalist, or both.
item.dc:creator: TIM REYNOLDS, Associated Press, Fox 5

item.title: Avid volunteer enjoys first Genesis Invitational
item.description: Jenny Liu has volunteered at Torrey Pines for 24 years. She’s seen a lot in her time, but this week it was her first experience with the Genesis Invitational.
item.dc:creator: Frank Jefferson, Fox 5

item.title: Final field of 41 set for Daytona 500; Bubba Wallace, Austin Cindric win Duels
item.description: DAYTONA, Fla. (WGHP) — The field of 41 racers has officially been set for Sunday's Daytona 500. This Sunday at 1:30 p.m., the NASCAR series kicks off with the legendary Daytona 500 at Daytona International Speedway in Daytona Beach, Florida.
item.dc:creator: Brayden Stamps, WGN 9

item.title: Fraser Bullock, Brad Wilson, Steve Starks to lead organizing committee for 2034 Olympic Games
item.description: State and Olympic officials named a 25-person organizing committee, led by Committee President Fraser Bullock, former House Speaker Brad Wilson, and Utah business executive Steve Starks.
item.dc:creator: Derick Fox, ABC 4
